author: Ameen Hassan
summary: The user asked for an update on 'the vault setup we are building.' The assistant searched local project memory and the AgentOS ameen-context MCP for any prior context on a vault project, found nothing, and listed the current working directory (Workshop_1_Files, a Building Bridges workshop folder) to confirm there was no local project context. A memory search for 'vault' returned zero results. The session ended with the assistant asking the user to clarify what the vault setup is, which project it belongs to, and what work has already been done.
problems: No prior memory or context for a 'vault setup' project exists in the AgentOS memory system
Current working directory (Workshop_1_Files) is unrelated to any vault project
Session terminated before the user provided clarification
approaches: Searched local project memory directory for vault context
Listed files in the current working directory to identify project context
Searched AgentOS ameen-context MCP using query 'vault'
Asked the user for clarification on the vault project
results: Memory search for 'vault' returned zero results
Current working directory contains Workshop_1_Files (Building Bridges workshop materials), unrelated to vault
No prior session context for a vault setup was found anywhere in the memory system
open_questions: What is 'the vault setup'? Which project does it belong to?
What work on the vault setup has already been completed?
Where are the vault project files located?
